onset.Description: Event onset relative to the start of the recording.

duration.Description: Event duration in seconds; n/a for instantaneous categorization trials.

stim_category.Description: True category of the displayed food image; n/a where the stimulus category was not logged.

response.Description: Participant response mapped to category from the pressed key; ? where a non-response key was pressed; n/a for non-trial rows.

Levels.?: Key pressed was not a valid response key

response_key.Description: Physical key pressed by the participant; other for any key that was not M or X; n/a for non-trial rows.

Levels.other: A key other than M or X

response_time.Description: Time from image onset to keypress in seconds.

accuracy.Description: Whether the response matched the stimulus category; n/a where the stimulus category was unknown or for non-trial rows.
